name: ASUS PRO WS Z890-ACE SE ATX Workstation Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - Supports DDR5-9066+(OC) - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 4x M.2 Slots - Thunderbolt 4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - BMC VGA Port - BMC Management Port - 10Gb & 5Gb Ethernet
shortName: ASUS PRO WS Z890-ACE SE ATX Workstation Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851
description: Professional workstation ATX motherboard for Intel LGA1851 with DDR5, PCIe 5.0, and dual Ethernet for demanding workloads.
